/CAL: SENTENCE/X: CR-110 SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT,/X: THE AMOUNT OF$ 4799,00 IS PAYABLE TO PETER GUAN,/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 14D /CTS:14//CTORD: SCRAM MONITORING FOR 8 MONTHS BEGINNING 09-22-09/DNACOMP/WS/WEAP/CTORD: WEAPON IN THIS MATTER IS TO BE CONFISCATED AND DESTROYED/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE/ICNA/PF500/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/CTORD: COUNSELINGTO BE DETERMINED BY APD/RESTV/SA1: PETER GUAN/SA2: 342 LISBON ST, SF/

/CAL:I&A, P&C AND BAIL HRG/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/BAIL:500,000/X:10 DAY WAIVED, NTW AS TO 60 DAY/LD:08-20-07 (60 DAY)/CONTD:TO SET IN M20/SA1:BAISONG MI, RULYING ZHOU, CNO SHING CHONG, OI LIN NGO, PETER PEN FEI GUAN, LINA XIAOLIAN AO GUAN, TIFFANY GUAN, YELIAN AO,ASHELY GUAN, SHUK YI CHONG, HOI T CHONG, JASPER GUAN, JANINE KUBERT, JAVIERVIGIL-ARAGON/SA2:342 LISBUN ST, SF/X:IF DEF IS RELEASED ON BAIL HE IS TOOBTAIN SCRAM DEVICE, UNDERGO ALCOHOLCNSLING AND POSSESS NO WEAPONS/
